name: firered-image-edit
notes_low: FireRed Image Edit 1.0 FP8-mixed (~21GB) + Qwen 2.5 VL FP8 + VAE + optional Lightning LoRA. Do not enable ModelSamplingAuraFlow (black output). Community NVFP4 (~12GB) when NVFP4_SUPPORTED=true and NVFP4_MODE=allow-community.
notes_high: FireRed 1.0 BF16 (~40GB disk) + Qwen 2.5 VL BF16 + VAE + Lightning LoRA. Heavy VRAM; use LOW_VRAM and CLI reserve flags if needed.
description: FireRed Image Edit 1.0 region-aware editing with Qwen 2.5 VL and UNETLoader diffusion_models layout.
